hero.title: Manage Your Business with
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform that combines a powerful mobile app and comprehensive web dashboard to streamline your business operations.

section.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
section.subtitle: Powerful features designed for modern businesses

list.title: Native Mobile App
list.description: Built with React Native for seamless iOS and Android experience. Access your business data anytime, anywhere with our lightning-fast mobile application.

list.title: Comprehensive Web Dashboard
list.description: Full-featured React dashboard with real-time analytics, advanced reporting, and intuitive data visualization to make informed decisions.

list.title: Real-Time Synchronization
list.description: All your data syncs instantly across mobile and web platforms. Work seamlessly from any device without missing a beat.

list.title: Team Collaboration
list.description: Invite team members, assign roles, and collaborate efficiently with built-in communication tools and permission management.

list.title: Advanced Analytics
list.description: Get deep insights into your business with customizable reports, charts, and KPI tracking that help you grow faster.

list.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
list.description: Your data is protected with end-to-end encryption, regular backups, and compliance with international security standards.

section.title: Choose Your Perfect Plan
section.subtitle: Transparent pricing that grows with your business

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for individuals and small teams just getting started

plans.name: Professional
plans.description: For growing businesses that need more power and flexibility

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: Custom solutions for large organizations with specific needs

items.question: Can I change my plan later?
items.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate the charges.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for Enterprise plans.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes! Our Professional plan comes with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

items.question: What happens to my data if I cancel?
items.answer: You can export all your data at any time. After cancellation, we keep your data for 30 days before permanent deletion.

hero.title: Building the Future of Business Management
hero.subtitle: We're on a mission to empower businesses with intuitive, powerful tools that drive growth and efficiency.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Founded in 2024, Sostentia Desk was born from a simple observation: businesses needed a unified platform that works seamlessly across mobile and web. We've built a solution that combines the convenience of mobile access with the power of comprehensive web analytics.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We continuously push boundaries to deliver cutting-edge solutions.

items.title: Simplicity
items.description: Complex problems deserve elegant, simple solutions.

items.title: Security
items.description: Your data security is our top priority, always.

items.title: Support
items.description: We're here to help you succeed, every step of the way.
